name: cc_attention_softmax_dropout_value_matmul_backward
author: cc

sources.content:
#pragma once

#include <torch/extension.h>
#include <cuda_runtime.h>

/**
 * Fused dropout backward + softmax backward kernel.
 *
 * Computes:
 *   grad_attn_weights = grad_attn_weights_dropped * dropout_mask / (1 - p)
 *   sum_term = sum(grad_attn_weights * attn_weights, dim=-1)
 *   grad_attn_scores = attn_weights * (grad_attn_weights - sum_term)
 *
 * Avoids materializing grad_attn_weights as a separate tensor.
 */
void fused_dropout_softmax_backward_launcher(
    torch::Tensor& grad_attn_scores,        // [B, H, S_q, S_kv] bf16 output
    const torch::Tensor& grad_attn_weights_dropped, // [B, H, S_q, S_kv] fp32
    const torch::Tensor& attn_weights,       // [B, H, S_q, S_kv] bf16
    const torch::Tensor& dropout_mask,       // [B, H, S_q, S_kv] bool
    float dropout_prob,
    cudaStream_t stream
);

/**
 * Fused GQA aggregation kernel.
 *
 * Reshapes [B, H, S_kv, D] to [B, H_kv, G, S_kv, D] and sums over G dimension.
 * Output is [B, H_kv, S_kv, D] in bf16.
 */
void gqa_aggregate_launcher(
    torch::Tensor& grad_value_states,        // [B, H_kv, S_kv, D] bf16 output
    const torch::Tensor& grad_value_expanded, // [B, H, S_kv, D] fp32
    int num_kv_heads,
    int num_groups,
    cudaStream_t stream
);

description: Round 0: cuBLAS matmuls + fused dropout-softmax-backward + fused GQA aggregation
